title: Befriend the Stalkers
description: Tame Nightmare Stalkers from born in chaos
body:
This mod allows you to tame the Nightmare Stalkers from born in chaos using monster flesh



due to limitations they still despaw during the day (unless you set the gamerule disappearanceofSpiritsUndertheSun(which makes ay spirit still survive duri the day) or name him "Lover") but tamed ones respaw at night in the correct place.
